text.text:
ESIC Hospital, Bihta – A Reliable Center for Quality Healthcare

ESIC Hospital, Bihta, located in Bihar, is one of the most important government hospitals run under the Employees’ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC). It provides affordable and quality healthcare services to employees and their families. The hospital has a clean and well-maintained campus with all the basic and modern medical facilities.

Different departments such as General Medicine, Surgery, Orthopedics, Gynecology, Pediatrics, and Emergency Services are available here. The doctors and nursing staff are skilled, polite, and always ready to help patients. The hospital management also focuses on cleanliness, safety, and patient comfort, which makes it a trusted healthcare center in the region.

For people living in and around Bihta, this hospital is a great support, offering affordable treatment without compromising quality. Over the years, ESIC Hospital, Bihta has earned people’s trust through its dedicated service and patient-friendly approach. It continues to play a vital role in improving healthcare facilities in this growing town.

OPD Opening hours: Monday to Friday 9 am to 4 pm, Saturday 9 am to 1 pm
OPD registration: Monday to Friday 9 am to 2:30 pm , Emergency 24×7 hours

text.text: Luxurious hospital and all facilities available here. Converted covid care hospital recently due to covid 19. Centrally airconditioner and laboratory and dispensary facility available here

text.text: The behaviour and way of talking of the parchi cutting  staf is very bad and improper there is no value of the person who visits there for treatment at government hospital.

originalText.text: The behaviour and way of talking of the parchi cutting  staf is very bad and improper there is no value of the person who visits there for treatment at government hospital.

text.text: Since I am pursuing mbbs there, I swear this central institute is best in academics after AIIMS in Bihar. Other than that, you will be provided government medical services at zero cost. All doctors are cooperative and supportive.

originalText.text: Since I am pursuing mbbs there, I swear this central institute is best in academics after AIIMS in Bihar. Other than that, you will be provided government medical services at zero cost. All doctors are cooperative and supportive.

text.text: Horrible emergency facilities. Had traumatic experience there. We were taking our mother, who had suffered heart attack, from Arrah to Patna on 19th Dec, 2024 in ambulance. However, due to road jam, caused by sand carrying trucks, the ambulance could reach only till Bihta in 2 hours. Considering the deteriorating condition of our mother, we took her to ESIC hospital at around 3am but to our horror, there was no doctor in emergency ward except for two technicians. They asked us to take her to Patna but due to terrible man made traffic jam, my mother breathed her last on the way itself. The whole episode speaks volume of the pathetic medical facilities in Group B & C towns and corrupt district administration.

originalText.text: Horrible emergency facilities. Had traumatic experience there. We were taking our mother, who had suffered heart attack, from Arrah to Patna on 19th Dec, 2024 in ambulance. However, due to road jam, caused by sand carrying trucks, the ambulance could reach only till Bihta in 2 hours. Considering the deteriorating condition of our mother, we took her to ESIC hospital at around 3am but to our horror, there was no doctor in emergency ward except for two technicians. They asked us to take her to Patna but due to terrible man made traffic jam, my mother breathed her last on the way itself. The whole episode speaks volume of the pathetic medical facilities in Group B & C towns and corrupt district administration.
